---
name: Scam report
about: Report a suspected CHATTY scam, fake link, impersonator, or unsafe request
title: "[Scam report] "
labels: scam-report
assignees: ""
---

## What happened?

Describe the suspicious link, account, message, or request.

## Evidence

Add source links or screenshots only if they do not expose private information.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not share private keys, seed phrases, passwords, or payment details.
- [ ] I did not connect a wallet because of this message.
- [ ] I verified the CHATTY contract from the site/repo.

CHATTY is unofficial, not affiliated with OpenAI/ChatGPT, not financial advice, and can go to zero.
